title: CodeGrind: DSA Practice Upgrades with AI Assist and Mobile Onboarding
summary: Highlight CodeGrind's latest DSA practice features, Azure OpenAI assistance, and revamped onboarding for mobile users, anchored by recent dev-focused updates.
core_message: CodeGrind now blends LeetCode-style problems with AI-powered guidance and a polished onboarding flow, plus an upgraded Tower Defense-inspired visualization of programming concepts. Real-time editor, model-switching AI, and streamlined sign-in improve practice efficiency and learning engagement.
cta: Try a guided problem now with AI assistance and share your progress with the CodeGrind community.
visual_brief: A short 20-30s demo video showing the CodeGrind editor in action: a user selects a problem, the AI assistant suggests hints, code is written with real-time feedback, and an on-screen onboarding tip highlights Google sign-in and mobile-friendly UI. Include cyberpunk UI accents and subtle tower-defense visuals in the background to tie to CodeGrind’s branding.

media.selection_reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.

linkedin.text: CodeGrind is upgrades to DSA practice with AI-assisted hints, a real-time editor, and a polished mobile onboarding flow. Try a guided problem now and share progress with the CodeGrind community at https://codegrind.online.
